creator: vova@fbsd.ru
text:
Recent changes of ICQ servers make SIM does not receive messages from ICQ users

Some more details here
http://developer.berlios.de/forum/forum.php?forum_id=23949

Fix: Update to new 0.9.4.2 fixes problem

% cvs diff net-im/sim-im
How-To-Repeat: 

install sim-im-0.9.4.1 and try to get message from another ICQ user
